---
title: "Untitled"
author: "John"
date: "2026-04-10"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(rbioapi)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
gene <- read.table("../gene_symbol_human_Newest.txt",header = F) %>%
  as.data.frame()
genes <- gene$V1
```

### acquire accession

```{r}

library(queryup)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# read symbol id list
gene <- read.table("../gene_symbol_human_Newest.txt", header = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
genes <- gene$V1

# construct requirement
query <- list(
  "gene_exact" = genes,
  "organism_id" = "9606",
  "reviewed" = "true"
)

# running for uniprot id
results <- query_uniprot(query = query, show_progress = TRUE)
print(names(results))

# make sure the column of Gene.Names exists
gene_names_col <- grep("Gene.Names", names(results), value = TRUE)[1]
if (is.na(gene_names_col)) {
  stop("haven't found the column of Gene.Names")
}

# get the gene name
results <- results %>%
  mutate(Main_Gene = sapply(strsplit(as.character(.data[[gene_names_col]]), "[ ;]"), `[`, 1))


# make up the final data-frame
input_df <- data.frame(Input_Gene = genes, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

output <- input_df %>%
  left_join(results, by = c("Input_Gene" = "Main_Gene")) %>%
  select(Entry, Input_Gene, everything()) # adjust the rank of column

head(output)
```

### family annotation

```{r}

get_uniprot_families_safe <- function(accession_ids, batch_size = 50) {
  # import package
  if (!requireNamespace("httr", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("No package called 'httr' found \n install.packages('httr')")
  }
  
  all_results <- list()
  
  for (i in seq_along(accession_ids)) {
    current_id <- accession_ids[i]
    
    # Construct a URL that only queries the current single ID
    query_string <- paste0("accession:", current_id)
    query_encoded <- URLencode(query_string, reserved = TRUE)
    full_url <- paste0(
      "https://rest.uniprot.org/uniprotkb/search?query=", query_encoded,
      "&format=tsv&fields=accession,protein_families"
    )
    
    # send commitment
    response <- tryCatch({
      httr::RETRY("GET", url = full_url, times = 3, pause_base = 1, quiet = TRUE)
    }, error = function(e) {
      return(NULL)
    })
    
    # Populate the list based on the response results
    if (!is.null(response) && httr::status_code(response) == 200) {
      content_text <- httr::content(response, "text", encoding = "UTF-8")
      batch_data <- tryCatch({
        read.delim(text = content_text, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, quote = "")
      }, error = function(e) {
        return(NULL)
      })
      
      if (!is.null(batch_data) && nrow(batch_data) > 0) {

        if ("Entry" %in% names(batch_data)) {
          names(batch_data)[names(batch_data) == "Entry"] <- "Accession"
        }
        if ("Protein.families" %in% names(batch_data)) {
          names(batch_data)[names(batch_data) == "Protein.families"] <- "Protein_families"
        }
        
        # make sure the column needing exists
        if ("Accession" %in% names(batch_data) && "Protein_families" %in% names(batch_data)) {
          all_results[[i]] <- data.frame(
            Input_Accession = current_id,
            Accession = batch_data$Accession[1],
            Protein_families = batch_data$Protein_families[1],
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        } else {
          # mark false if column unexists
          all_results[[i]] <- data.frame(
            Input_Accession = current_id,
            Accession = NA_character_,
            Protein_families = NA_character_,
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        }
      }
    }
  }
    # requirement delay
    Sys.sleep(0.2)
    
    # print process
    if (i %% 50 == 0) {
      cat(sprintf("%d / %d ID processed...\n", i, length(accession_ids)))
    }
  
  final_results <- do.call(rbind, all_results)
  return(final_results)
  
}
```

### superfamily annotation

```{r}

get_uniprot_superfamily_safe <- function(accession_ids, batch_size = 50) {
 
  all_results <- list()
  
  for (i in seq_along(accession_ids)) {
    current_id <- accession_ids[i]
    
    # access the SUPERFAMILY info from family_and_domains
    query_string <- paste0("accession:", current_id)
    query_encoded <- URLencode(query_string, reserved = TRUE)
    full_url <- paste0(
      "https://rest.uniprot.org/uniprotkb/search?query=", query_encoded,
      "&format=tsv&fields=accession,family_and_domains"
    )
    
    response <- tryCatch({
      httr::RETRY("GET", url = full_url, times = 3, pause_base = 1, quiet = TRUE)
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
    
    superfamily_text <- NA_character_
    uniprot_acc <- NA_character_
    
    if (!is.null(response) && httr::status_code(response) == 200) {
      content_text <- httr::content(response, "text", encoding = "UTF-8")
      batch_data <- tryCatch({
        read.delim(text = content_text, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, quote = "")
      }, error = function(e) NULL)
      
      if (!is.null(batch_data) && nrow(batch_data) > 0) {

        if ("Entry" %in% names(batch_data)) {
          names(batch_data)[names(batch_data) == "Entry"] <- "Accession"
        }
        # it'll be "Family.and.domains" or "Family and domains"
        fam_col <- grep("family.*domain", names(batch_data), ignore.case = TRUE, value = TRUE)
        if (length(fam_col) > 0) {
          fam_text <- batch_data[1, fam_col[1]]
          if (!is.na(fam_text) && nzchar(fam_text)) {
            # grep the row starting with "SUPERFAMILY"
            # "SUPERFAMILY: SSF...  description"）
            lines <- strsplit(fam_text, "; ")[[1]]
            super_lines <- grep("^SUPERFAMILY", lines, value = TRUE, ignore.case = FALSE)
            if (length(super_lines) > 0) {
              superfamily_text <- paste(super_lines, collapse = "; ")
            }
          }
          uniprot_acc <- batch_data[1, "Accession"]
        }
      }
    }
    
    all_results[[i]] <- data.frame(
      Input_Accession = current_id,
      Accession = uniprot_acc,
      Superfamily_info = superfamily_text,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    Sys.sleep(0.2)
    if (i %% 50 == 0) cat(sprintf("%d / %d ID processed...\n", i, length(accession_ids)))
  }
  
  final_results <- do.call(rbind, all_results)
  return(final_results)
}
```

### running

```{r}

accession_list <- results$Entry

# family acquire

## Running Function
family_info_full <- get_uniprot_families_safe(accession_list)
head(family_info_full)

## check missing ID
missing_ids <- family_info_full$Input_Accession[is.na(family_info_full$Accession)]
print(missing_ids)



# superfamily acquire

# Running Function
superfamily_info_full <- get_uniprot_superfamily_safe(accession_list)
head(superfamily_info_full)

# check missing ID
missing_super <- superfamily_info_full$Input_Accession[is.na(superfamily_info_full$Superfamily_info)]
print(missing_super)


merged_df <- merge(output, 
                   family_info_full, 
                   by.x = "Entry", 
                   by.y = "Input_Accession", 
                   all.x = TRUE) %>% 
  merge(.,
        superfamily_info_full,
        by.x = "Entry",
         by.y = "Input_Accession", 
                   all.x = TRUE) %>% 
  # keep other info with parameter in select: everything()
  select(Entry, Input_Gene, Protein_families, Superfamily_info) 

head(merged_df)

write.csv(merged_df,"family_info.csv",quote = F)
```
